items.message: CORE.md version 1.1 != meta 593d65ff333f9fad4e0dfc171d27316c — re-read CORE.md
1 bridge file(s) missing swarm signaling guidance: CLAUDE.md
6 bridge file(s) missing 'Minimum Swarmed Cycle' section (F-GOV2, L-351): CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md
Lesson over 20 lines: L-1531.md
Lesson over 20 lines: L-1535.md
Lesson over 20 lines: L-1537.md
Lesson over 20 lines: L-1538.md
Lesson over 20 lines: L-1541.md

[periodics-meta-audit] Periodic-system audit: evaluate periodics coverage/ROI, add or prune items, and update cadence based on observed utility and maintenance overhead. Confirm orient/check surfacing stays aligned. S395: pruned 3 dormant (cross-variant-harvest, modes-reswarm, action-board-refresh), adjusted 5 cadences (dream 7→15, proxy-k 10→15, paper 10→20, principles-dedup 10→15, iso-sprint 30→50). 22→19 items. S437: pruned iso-annotation-sprint (dark matter stable 75s), merged historian-repair into historian-routing. Adjusted 6 cadences: health 5→10, economy 5→10, setup 5→10, dream 15→25, proxy-k 15→25, science-quality 10→20. Load 3.86→2.8 runs/session. 27→25 items. (every ~15 sessions, last: S499)

[historian-routing] Historian routing + repair scan: (1) run python3 tools/historian_router.py — identify MERGED domain lanes with global frontier synthesis candidates; (2) run frontier_crosslink.py --apply --threshold 6 to maintain crosslinks (L-1022: link decay); (3) run historian_repair.py — detect stale beliefs (>50s), anxiety-zone frontiers (>15s), domain DOMEX gaps (>30s), apply --repair to close stale lanes. Route synthesis-ready work to dispatch. F-NK6 M3 mechanism (L-996, L-800). S436: domain→global linkage 28.3%. Target: maintain ≥20% linkage. L-1060: cadence 5→3 (M3 routing generates ~2 updates/session; tighter cadence maintains global coverage). (every ~15 sessions, last: S499)

[external-scanning] External innovation scanning: search Reddit, GitHub, arXiv for projects in self-evolving agents, swarm intelligence, knowledge graphs, stigmergy spaces. Map findings to swarm mechanisms. Write externally-grounded lessons. Advances F-GND1 + F-ABSORB1. L-1308: scanning is cheapest grounding path. L-601: without periodic enforcement, voluntary scanning decays to zero. (every ~15 sessions, last: S500)

[enforce-l-1212] Enforce L-1212: Wire grounding checks into check.sh at lesson creation time, not into periodic measurement. L-601 predicts: measurement . Auto-generated by prescription_enforcer.py. (every ~15 sessions, last: S500)

[enforce-l-757] Enforce L-757: Classification error corrupts metrics more than policy change. S382 "regression" = close_lane.py bugs (L-747). S384+ "de. Auto-generated by prescription_enforcer.py. (every ~15 sessions, last: S500)

[enforce-l-835] Enforce L-835: Root cause: "read SWARM.md for full protocol" delegation fails when nodes don't re-read SWARM.md each session. Fix: add . Auto-generated by prescription_enforcer.py. (every ~15 sessions, last: S500)

[phil-retest] PHIL claim retest: run dogma_finder.py, select 2-3 highest-scoring PHIL claims, retest with external evidence or falsification attempt. L-1314: PHIL claims have no structural retest mechanism (beliefs have DEPS.md 'Last tested' field; PHIL has no equivalent). 18/22 PHIL claims scored >=0.6 dogma at S500. CONFIRM-ONLY pattern (challenges never DROPPED) is the primary signal. Target: reduce mean PHIL dogma score below 0.8. (every ~15 sessions, last: S500)

[steerer-cycle] Synthetic steerer cycle: run steerer.py run --all, generate 2-3 signals per steerer, record via steerer.py record, act on strongest signal. L-1337, L-1336. (every ~5 sessions, last: S518)
1 signal(s) >30 sessions without resolution: SIG-77(+33s). Close or escalate (L-908 TTL).
Count drift in INDEX.md (L: stated 1307 vs actual 1308) — run python3 tools/sync_state.py
3 broken file reference(s): SWARM.md->modes/BASE.md, SWARM.md->modes/audit.md, NEXT.md->tools/guards/00-mass-deletion.sh
72 tools unreferenced by automation (>61 threshold, L-896) — open a meta-tooler DOMEX lane to wire or archive
INDEX.md theme counts stale: 226 lessons unthemed — refresh theme table counts (L-1111, F-BRN4 sawtooth cycle)
